notes: Collected 2026-06-12 by locator agent. websterdental.com has SSL failure; live site is webdentalchicago.com. Homepage claims '12 Locations' but locations-sitemap.xml lists only 8 active offices with fetchable addresses. Archived /locations-old/ lists 11 incl. Sauganash, Schaumburg, and 'Webster Concierge Office of Michael Connolly DDS' — those pages 404/500, no verifiable address, EXCLUDED per documentary-evidence rule. Parent management entity: Webster Dental Management (websterdentalmanagement.com in footer). No PE sponsor named. Site notes Webster acquired the former 'Chicago Dental Professionals' (CDP) practice.
